full_name_en: Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Pêcheries et de l'Alimentation du Québec
full_name_fr: Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Pêcheries et de l'Alimentation du Québec
description_en: MAPAQ regulates food safety and inspects food businesses in Quebec. Any business that prepares, transforms, or sells food for human consumption may require a MAPAQ permit.
description_fr: Le MAPAQ réglemente la salubrité alimentaire et inspecte les entreprises alimentaires au Québec.

permits.required_for_en: Any fixed or mobile location preparing or selling food to the public

inspection_requirements_en: Employee food handler training (MAPAQ recommends HACCP-based training)
